name: Flapjacks (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) or Mark 4.
2. Grease an 11 inch x 7 inch baking tin.
3. Melt butter or margarine, caster sugar, and golden syrup together in a pan until all are melted.
4. Gradually stir in the rolled oats, combining well with the syrup mixture.
5. Press the mixture into the prepared tin.
6. Bake for about 20 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely in the tin.
8. Turn out onto a plate and break up into fingers.
9. The flapjacks should remain soft and moist.
